description_long: This is a sleek, modern laptop with a thin profile and a minimalist design, featuring a matte black finish. The display is large and vibrant, with a thin bezel and a colorful abstract wallpaper visible on the screen. The keyboard is backlit and features a standard QWERTY layout with a prominent trackpad below it. The exterior lid is adorned with a single, centered, glossy apple-shaped logo, indicating a premium brand. The laptop appears to be constructed primarily from metal and plastic, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight feel. No external ports or stickers are visible on the sides or palm rest, maintaining a clean and uncluttered appearance.
description: A modern, matte black laptop with a large display, backlit keyboard, and a centered apple-shaped logo on the lid. The design is sleek and minimalist, with no visible ports or stickers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open display with a colorful wallpaper, backlit keyboard, and large trackpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thin profile and the open screen; no ports or stickers are visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the matte black lid with a centered, glossy apple-shaped logo.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim design and open screen, with no visible ports or stickers.
attribute_brand_logo: A glossy, centered apple-shaped logo is visible on the back of the lid.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a colorful abstract wallpaper.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and no numeric keypad; backlit keys are visible.
